title: Bad Bunny Spotted at Coachella 2026 Attending Justin Bieber's Headlining Set
detail: Bad Bunny was among the celebrity audience members at Coachella 2026 Weekend 1 in Indio, California, spotted watching Justin Bieber's Saturday night headlining performance. He attended alongside stars including Adele, Kylie Jenner, Timothée Chalamet, Lisa (BLACKPINK), Lizzo, and Paris Hilton. Separately, Bad Bunny and The Weeknd were seen together at the festival, blending incognito into the crowd with bandanas covering their faces — two of the world's highest-streaming artists quietly enjoying the music without drawing attention. Bad Bunny is not performing at Coachella 2026; his Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour's European leg begins May 22 in Barcelona. His attendance fueled widespread speculation that he might join fellow Super Bowl LX performer Karol G on stage for her historic Sunday headlining set.
